channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Life and Legacy of June Allyson, Hollywood’s Beloved Actress
item.description: Born Eleanor Geisman in 1917 in The Bronx, New York City, June Allyson became one of Hollywood’s most cherished actresses during the 1940s and 1950s. Known for her warm smile, bobbed blonde hair, and ...

item.title: Rupee Weakens Against US Dollar Amid Rising Oil Prices and Global Uncertainty
item.description: On Friday, May 15, 2026, the Indian rupee opened weaker and fell by 30 paise to 95.94 against the US dollar in early trade, following three consecutive sessions of decline. Elevated crude oil prices, ...

item.title: Kenya Launches First Wastewater-Based Study on Drug Use in East Africa
item.description: Kenya has become the first country in East Africa to carry out a comprehensive wastewater-based epidemiology study to monitor drug use. The report, released by NACADA, analysed 152 wastewater samples ...

item.title: Star Cinema's Film 'Meet, Greet & Bye' Receives Major Awards at Cine Expo 2026
item.description: Star Cinema's latest film, 'Meet, Greet & Bye,' has been recognized for its excellence at the 2026 Cine Expo, securing top honors during the prestigious event. This achievement highlights the studio's...

item.title: CRDB rewards three lucky customers with World Cup tickets in Canada
item.description: Recently, three lucky customers of CRDB Bank were awarded tickets to travel and attend World Cup matches in Canada. This promotion by CRDB aims to reward loyal customers and give them a chance to expe...

item.title: PPP's Shazia Marri clarifies Bilawal interaction during press conference
item.description: PPP MNA and spokesperson Shazia Marri clarified on Friday that a brief interaction between her and PPP Chairperson Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari during a press conference should not be interpreted in isolati...

item.title: The Rolling Stones Recreated in 1970s Style for ‘In The Stars’ Video Using Deepfake Technology
item.description: The Rolling Stones have unveiled a new video for their single ‘In The Stars’, featuring the band digitally de-aged to their 1970s selves using advanced deepfake technology. Directed by Francois Rousse...

item.title: Pak-US Relations Discussed Amid Security, Trade, and Middle East Cooperation
item.description: Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi stated on Friday that relations between Pakistan and the United States had become stronger during the tenure of former US President Donald Trump. The announcement came d...

item.title: Top Earners Revealed in 2026 Sunday Times Rich List Including Sir David Beckham and Gallagher Brothers

item.title: Bayelsa East Stakeholders Endorse Senator Agadaga For Second Term
item.description: Stakeholders from Bayelsa East Senatorial District don come together on Monday to endorse their current Senator, Benson Agadaga, to run for a second term. Dr. Iti Orugbani, former Commissioner for Cul...

item.title: Memorable Mistakes and Heartbreaks in FIFA World Cup History
item.description: The FIFA World Cup no be just about goals and glory; e get plenty heartbreaks wey still dey ring bell for football fans mind. One of the saddest wahala na when Colombian defender Andrés Escobar score ...

item.title: East Africa Nordic Investment Summit in Dar es Salaam Highlights Digital Growth and Youth Agri-Export Opportunities
item.description: On 25th and 26th February 2026, Dar es Salaam hosted the East Africa Nordic Investment Summit, organised by Tanzania's Innovation for Development (I4D). The summit gathered government officials, Nordi...

item.title: Helsinki Airport restarts operations after temporary drone alert
item.description: On Friday, May 15, 2026, Helsinki Airport resumed its normal flight operations following a temporary suspension caused by a drone warning. The air traffic was paused from 4 a.m. to 7 a.m. after author...

item.title: Kirinyaga County Opens 21 Job Vacancies on Permanent and Contractual Terms
item.description: The Kirinyaga County Government, through its Public Service Board, has opened applications for 21 job positions across various departments. The vacancies include both permanent and pensionable roles a...

item.title: Annabella Sciorra's Acting Career and Impact in the 1990s
item.description: Annabella Sciorra, born on March 29, 1960, was a prominent figure in 1990s cinema, often recognized for her intelligent, grounded, and fiercely independent presence. She made her film debut with 'True...

item.title: Senate Sergeant-at-Arms assures fair treatment for Senator dela Rosa amid ICC warrant
item.description: Senate Sergeant-at-Arms Mao Aplasca confirmed that Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa will not receive any special treatment despite an International Criminal Court (ICC) arrest warrant issued against hi...

item.title: Plaid Cymru Government in Cardiff Sets Out Plans for Expanded Welsh Powers
item.description: Following the 2026 Senedd election, Plaid Cymru has emerged as the largest party and is forming the next Welsh government, marking the first administration not led by Welsh Labour since devolution beg...

item.title: Federal Judge Criticizes Trump DOJ for Mishandling Discovery in Don Lemon Case
item.description: A federal magistrate judge sharply criticized the Trump administration's Department of Justice for mismanaging the discovery process in the criminal case involving former CNN reporter Don Lemon and pr...

item.title: Protecting Education Amid Increasing Extreme Weather in South Africa
item.description: South Africa is facing a growing challenge as extreme weather events, intensified by climate change, increasingly disrupt the basic education system. Recent extreme rainfall, particularly in the Easte...

item.title: Expert Warns Trump Could Use Presidential Emergency Directives to Influence 2026 Midterms
item.description: Former U.S. Special Envoy Jonathan Winer has expressed concern that President Donald Trump may employ Presidential Emergency Action Documents (PEADs) to influence the 2026 midterm elections. PEADs are...
